description: Behavior evals verify: phase guard (must be cleanup), ancestor check per branch before any destructive action, typed-keyword confirmation on direct invocation, archive-before-remove ordering, phase=done stamped in archive, local branch deleted without touching remote, worktrees removed via git worktree remove, and confirmation skipped when invoked by springboot-feature-bootstrap.

cases.prompt: Clean up PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows phase: implementation. Describe what you do.

Clean up PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows phase: cleanup. Three services: payment-service, order-service, notification-service. git merge-base --is-ancestor returns exit code 1 for notification-service. Describe what you do.

Clean up PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows phase: cleanup. Two services: payment-service (ancestor check passes) and order-service (not yet checked). Describe whether you check both branches or only the first.
Clean up PROJ-1234 (invoked directly by the user, not by springboot-feature-bootstrap). All branches verified merged. Describe what you ask the user before removing anything.
Clean up PROJ-1234 (invoked by springboot-feature-bootstrap as phase 9). All branches verified merged. Describe whether you prompt the user for typed confirmation.

must_not_contain_in_output: I will ask the user to type

cases.prompt: Clean up PROJ-1234. All branches verified merged. User confirmed. Describe the order: do you archive artifacts first or remove worktrees first?

must_not_contain_in_output: I remove the worktrees before archiving

cases.prompt: Clean up PROJ-1234. All steps complete. Describe what you write into the archived feature-state.json.
Clean up PROJ-1234. All verified merged. User confirmed. Archive done. Describe the command you use to remove each worktree.
Clean up PROJ-1234. Worktrees removed. Describe which branches you delete and which you keep.
Clean up PROJ-1234. feature-state.json merges field: { payment-service: abc1234, order-service: def5678 }. Describe what you write in the archive README.md.
